economic_notes: Member of Prince Albert Grand Council (12 Nations). Holds 8.33% ownership in Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP and Prince Albert Development Corporation. Received $50,000 distribution from PAFNBD LP. Has ongoing specific claim treaty benefits negotiation against Government of Canada initiated in 2019.
notes: Segmented information note (Note 19) appears to be cut off in the provided text. No schedule of remuneration was included in the document. Consolidated entities include Shoal Lake Cree Nation Operations and Section 95 Social Housing Operation. Two government business partnerships (Prince Albert Development Corporation and Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP) are accounted for under modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,064,109 + PAGC $1,348,883 + CMHC $283,594 + First Nations Trust $602,261 + Nechapanuk $8,000 + NLCDC $142,010 = $18,448,857; OSR = total revenue $23,687,314 minus government transfers $18,448,857 = $5,238,457. Note: amortization per TCA schedule is $1,188,522 but statement of operations shows $1,174,874. Operating fund deficit of $6,002,365. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded relative to required level.
